hero.discoverProjects: Discover my projects integrating AI, intelligent automation and the latest technological innovations on Vercel and GitHub!

currentProject.title: Current Project
currentProject.description: Currently, I am working on a software project aimed at facilitating connections between investors and local stakeholders. The goal is to enable investments in various sectors, thereby fostering the development of regions conducive to the well-being of the population.
currentProject.scrollDown: Scroll down to see more projects!

services.title: Services Offered
services.subtitle: Bringing your ideas to life within your timeline and budget.
services.webSaasDesc: We create web and SAAS applications of any complexity, with no limits on integration or scalability, efficiently managing inputs, outputs, databases and multiple external components.
services.aiDesc: Our AI solutions are designed to automate your processes, analyze your data and provide predictive insights to transform your business through artificial intelligence.
services.mobileDesc: We create high-performance mobile applications with React Native, optimized for Android and iOS platforms.
services.learningDesc: Our React learning program offers hands-on projects and expert guidance to help you master fundamental and advanced React development concepts.

howItWorks.processSubtitle: A structured and iterative approach to transform your ideas into high-performing digital products

howItWorks.frontendDesc: Development of responsive and high-performing user interfaces with the latest technologies.
howItWorks.backendDesc: Scalable server architecture, secure RESTful APIs and optimized database management.
howItWorks.qualityDesc: Continuous integration pipeline, automated tests and secure deployment with real-time monitoring.

appShowcase.webAppsDesc: Web applications I have developed for my clients.

fullstackNode.expertise: I bring FullStack expertise to your projects!
fullstackNode.subtitle: Unified JavaScript ecosystem for high-performing and real-time applications

fullstackSpring.subtitle: Fullstack Java architecture: enterprise security, Docker deployment, 24/7.
fullstackSpring.description: End-to-end Citizen → Agent → Admin flow. Replaces town-hall visits and paper forms with a secure, fully traceable online workflow.
fullstackSpring.problemDesc: No travel, no paper. Processing in hours instead of weeks.
fullstackSpring.securityDesc: JWT · Spring Security · BCrypt · strict RBAC · audit trail · GDPR-compliant.
fullstackSpring.stackDesc: Spring Boot: enterprise robustness. MySQL: ACID integrity. React + TS: typed UX.
fullstackSpring.dockerDesc: Front, back and DB orchestrated via Docker Compose. Reproducible deployment in one command.
fullstackSpring.projectDesc: From identification to final processing, every step is encrypted, audited and GDPR-compliant. Deployable anywhere via Docker.

fullstackFlyTaxi.subtitle: Flight + taxi booking unified by AI. Java, PostgreSQL, Docker architecture.
fullstackFlyTaxi.description: SaaS platform that unifies flight booking and ground transport. An AI recommendation engine composes the best door-to-door itinerary based on budget, duration and preferences.
fullstackFlyTaxi.problemDesc: No more juggling between apps. One journey: flight + taxi = door-to-door.
fullstackFlyTaxi.securityDesc: JWT · Spring Security · BCrypt · encryption at rest · PCI-DSS & GDPR-compliant.
fullstackFlyTaxi.stackDesc: Spring Boot: transactional reliability. PostgreSQL: ACID + JSONB for AI. React + TS: fluid UX.
fullstackFlyTaxi.dockerDesc: Multi-service orchestration via Docker Compose. Horizontal scaling Kubernetes-ready.
fullstackFlyTaxi.projectDesc: AI engine, secure payment and observability built in. Deployable anywhere via Docker.

caseStudies.title: Case
caseStudies.subtitle: Discover in detail how I helped my clients achieve their goals

germe.title: Germe Invest Investment Platform
germe.challengeDesc: Germe Invest needed a modern platform to showcase their investment services and allow clients to track their portfolios. The old site was outdated and did not reflect the company's professionalism.
germe.solutionDesc: Development of a responsive platform with React and TypeScript, integrating a secure client dashboard, real-time performance charts and an appointment booking system. Architecture optimized for performance and SEO.

sport.title: Sport Challenge Mobile App
sport.challengeDesc: Create an engaging mobile app allowing users to discover and participate in local sports challenges. The main challenge was to gamify the experience while maintaining an intuitive interface.
sport.solutionDesc: React Native app with Expo, using smooth animations (Reanimated), geolocation for local challenges, points and ranking system, push notifications for user engagement.

dreamquest.title: DreamQuest - AI Dream Visualization
dreamquest.challengeDesc: Transform textual dream descriptions into immersive 3D visualizations. The technical challenge was integrating generative AI (OpenAI) with a smooth 3D experience in the browser.
dreamquest.solutionDesc: Web application combining React, Three.js for 3D rendering, and the OpenAI API for interpretation and image generation. Implementation of a dream saving system and social sharing.

items.name: Jean-Pierre Moussavou
items.content: Davy transformed our vision into a modern and intuitive investment platform. His technical expertise and understanding of business needs were remarkable.

items.name: Marie-Claire Ndong
items.content: An exceptional collaboration! Davy created an e-commerce marketplace that perfectly reflects our identity. Sales have increased by 150% since launch.

items.name: Thomas Dubois
items.content: The mobile app developed by Davy exceeds our expectations. The user interface is smooth, performance is excellent. Remarkable work.

items.name: Sophie Lemaire
items.content: Davy integrated AI in an innovative way into our project. The 3D visualization of dreams with Three.js is stunning. A creative developer who pushes boundaries.

items.name: Alexandre Martin
items.content: Flawless blockchain solution. Davy perfectly masters Web3 technologies and created a smooth user experience for our P2P payment app.

features: Context API and Redux for global state

tailwind.description: Utility-first CSS framework enabling rapid development and consistent design

dockerSection.portabilityDesc: Develop once, deploy anywhere. Perfect consistency between dev, test and prod.

dockerSection.devopsDesc: Automated pipelines for fast, reliable and frequent deployments.
